included_line_samples: work authorization: open to all eligible candidates (opt/cpt/h-1b transfers welcome)

mayzax solutions is a fast-growing technology and consulting firm delivering data, cloud, and automation solutions to clients across the u.s. we help organizations turn raw data into powerful insights using modern engineering practices.

we are seeking a motivated entry-level data engineer to join our engineering team. this is an excellent opportunity for recent graduates or early-career professionals who want to start their career in data engineering, work with modern cloud tools, and grow under senior technical mentors.
assist in building and maintaining etl/elt pipelines for data ingestion and transformation.
write clean and efficient python and sql scripts for data processing.
support the development of data warehouses and data lakes.

location: remote (based in usa)

work authorization: open to all eligible candidates (opt/cpt/h-1b transfers welcome)
about mayzax solutions

mayzax solutions is a fast-growing technology and consulting firm delivering data, cloud, and automation solutions to clients across the u.s. we help organizations turn raw data into powerful insights using modern engineering practices.
position overview

we are seeking a motivated entry-level data engineer to join our engineering team. this is an excellent opportunity for recent graduates or early-career professionals who want to start their career in data engineering, work with modern cloud tools, and grow under senior technical mentors.
assist in building and maintaining etl/elt pipelines for data ingestion and transformation.
write clean and efficient python and sql scripts for data processing.
support the development of data warehouses and data lakes.
help monitor data workflows and troubleshoot pipeline issues.
work closely with senior engineers to implement best practices for data quality, governance, and performance.
collaborate with analysts and cross-functional teams to ensure availability of reliable datasets.
document processes, workflows, and system updates.
required skills & qualifications
bachelor’s degree in computer science, data engineering, it, or a related field.
strong foundation in:
python
